gaps: Runtime implementation remains gated; P97 plans only.

public_search_index_gate_review.current_ordering_behavior: current local public search ordering remains unchanged by P97
public_search_index_gate_review.current_explanation_support_status: P96 contract exists; no runtime explanation generation is implemented
gaps: No public search response/order change allowed in P97.

eval_baseline_gate_review.external_baseline_comparison_status: not eligible for production-quality claims; 0 observed records
gaps: Dedicated ranking regression corpus is not defined.
Manual external baseline observations remain pending.

hosted_deployment_gate_review.p77_status: present but hosted/static verification not production-ready
gaps: Hosted backend URL is not configured.
Configured static deployment verification is failed.
Hosted staging ranking must remain blocked.

runtime_boundary: No ranking runtime, public search order/response change, hidden score, suppression, telemetry, model call, live source call, or mutation.
ranking_runtime_architecture_plan: Future modules only under runtime/engine/ranking and runtime/gateway/public_api/ranking; no runtime files created in P97.
ranking_input_output_model: Inputs are public-safe result envelope fields only; outputs are same result set plus proposed order and explanations, with current-order fallback.
ranking_pipeline_plan: Validate request, read candidates, extract factors, compute evidence/compatibility factors, attach cautions, tie-break, explain, fallback, no mutation.
evidence_weighted_integration_plan: Use evidence/provenance/source/freshness/conflict/provisional/gap/action/risk factors without treating them as truth.
compatibility_aware_integration_plan: Use optional public-safe target profile and compatibility evidence; no installability or dependency-safety claims.
result_merge_identity_integration_plan: Use identity and merge refs for grouping signals only; preserve alternatives and conflicts; no destructive merge.
search_result_explanation_integration_pl: Every ranked result needs explanation; hidden numeric scores and raw private query text are forbidden.
eval_regression_plan: Archive/search usefulness evals plus future ranking regression corpus and external baseline evidence before runtime/quality claims.
safe_fallback_rollback_model: Disabled by default, current-order fallback, kill switch, ranking/explanation failure returns current order.
privacy_no_telemetry_no_hidden_score_pol: No raw query retention, IP/account/session/user-profile/ad/telemetry/model signal, hidden score, or private path/URL factor.
security_abuse_review: Caps, no selector params, no local files, no live/model calls, no ranking-store writes, no telemetry, operator kill switch.
implementation_phases: Phase 2 shadow ranking test report only
acceptance_criteria: hosted deployment evidence required for hosted mode

command_results.adjacent_validators: requested search explanation, extraction, pack/page/source-runtime, connector-runtime, public query observation, compatibility/evidence/ranking, result merge, identity, page, baseline, hosted deployment, public search, safety, rehearsal, static site, publication, and generated-artifact checks passed when present

command_results.external_baseline_status: Manual Observation Batch 0 remains 0 observed / 39 pending; production-quality ranking claims remain ineligible
command_results.hosted_deployment_status: verify_public_hosted_deployment passed as evidence; static_site_status=verified_failed, hosted_backend_status=not_configured, route_verification_status=not_configured, safety/search handoff operator-gated
